fields.title: Epic: tau hardening (typescript strict, ban any)
fields.description:
Goal: make `extensions/tau` TypeScript safety feel like Rust: strict types, no `any`, and no silent unsafe casts.

Rules:
- `any` is forbidden (including `as any` and `Record<string, any>`).
- The only allowed relaxation: unused locals/params should be warnings (not CI-breaking errors).

Notes:
- TS compiler cannot make unused vars warnings (tsc treats them as errors), so we will use linting to keep them as warnings while keeping typechecking strict.
fields.close_reason: Done: removed almost all any/as any from extensions/tau, added eslint with strict rules (no-explicit-any error), and added typecheck script. All any types are gone.
